summary: Iran's IRGC Navy political deputy, Mohammad Akbarzadeh, was killed in a reported vehicle overturn in Kerman Province, with conflicting accounts between a security attack in Kermanshah and a road accident. Israel Defense Minister Katz stated the IDF will not withdraw from southern Lebanon, Syria, or Gaza until Hezbollah is disarmed, and confirmed near-100% destruction of Shiite villages along the line of contact in western and central sectors. Trump announced Iran requested a meeting in Doha, while Iran's Foreign Ministry denied any upcoming negotiations with the US at any level.
key_points: IRGC Navy political deputy and Velayat-e Faqih representative office deputy Mohammad Akbarzadeh was killed; one source reports a security attack at a checkpoint in Baveh, Kermanshah, while a regime-affiliated source describes a road accident vehicle overturn in Kerman Province. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373618, @shin_persian/7300, @rodast_omiddana/74530)

Israel Defense Minister Katz stated the IDF will not withdraw a millimeter from Lebanon until Hezbollah is disarmed, confirmed the IDF holds nearly 70% of Gaza, and that the US and Israel agreed the IDF will not withdraw from security zones in Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Iran's Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei denied Iran has any negotiation sessions at any level with the US in coming days, contradicting earlier White House claims of high-level talks in Doha this week. (Source: @SharghDaily/168834)

Trump stated on Truth Social that Iran requested a meeting to take place tomorrow in Doha, while a US diplomat source indicated Witkoff and Kushner would meet Qatari mediators on Tuesday, with technical teams meeting separately on Wednesday. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4504, @SharghDaily/168834)

IDF spokesperson released a viral video stating Hamas is on the way to disappearing, and the IDF confirmed sealing the tunnel where deputy Hadar Goldin's body was held, which served as a headquarters for a Hamas battalion commander and was over 16 km long. (Source: @inon_yttach/9210, @amitsegal/62648)

Katz confirmed near-100% destruction of villages along the line of contact in western and central southern Lebanon, 73% in the eastern sector, with approximately 600,000 Shiites fled from southern Lebanon villages and 700,000 displaced from Beirut's Dahiyeh. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Qatar's Ministry of Transportation advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing and maritime activities, and a Foreign Ministry delegation and Home Front Command mission are heading to Venezuela following an earthquake. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518, @amitsegal/62657)

An IDF event occurred in southern Lebanon with details pending in an official spokesperson announcement, while warplanes were reported flying toward Lebanon with maximum caution, and drone detection statistics from southern Lebanon showed 153 drones detected in one day. (Source: @pkpoi/143026, @redlinkleb/29078, @redlinkleb/29102)

sections.executive_summary: The killing of a senior IRGC Navy political deputy under conflicting circumstances represents a significant escalation in shadow conflict dynamics between Iran and Israel. Israel's Defense Minister publicly committed to long-term IDF presence across multiple fronts including Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza, while confirming massive destruction in southern Lebanese border villages. Diplomatic channels between Iran and the US appear chaotic with contradictory statements about Doha negotiations even as Trump announced an imminent meeting request from Tehran.

points: Mohammad Akbarzadeh, political deputy of the IRGC Navy and deputy of the Velayat-e Faqih Representative Office in the IRGC Navy, was killed; one source reports two security martyred in an attack by Mossad gangs on a security checkpoint in Baveh, Kermanshah Province in western Iran, while a regime-affiliated source describes a vehicle overturn road accident in Kerman Province. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373618, @shin_persian/7300, @rodast_omiddana/74530)

Akbarzadeh was described as opposed to President Khatami and negotiations with America, suggesting internal Iranian political divisions over diplomatic engagement with the US. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74530)

Iran's Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei explicitly denied that Iran will hold any negotiation sessions at any level with the US side in coming days, directly contradicting White House claims of high-level talks scheduled in Doha this week. (Source: @SharghDaily/168834)

Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi arrived in Oman to discuss joint control of the Strait of Hormuz, indicating Iranian diplomatic efforts to secure strategic maritime interests amid tensions. (Source: @asafroz/50835)

Iranian sources claimed numerous images exist from arrest raids in Iraq but alleged those being shared are AI-generated, suggesting an information operations dimension to regional security events. (Source: @shin_persian/7299)

Trump posted on Truth Social that Iran requested a meeting to take place tomorrow in Doha, while a Shargh Daily report cited a US diplomat saying Witkoff and Kushner would meet Qatari Prime Minister and other officials on Tuesday to discuss Iran negotiations, with technical teams meeting Qatari and Pakistani mediators separately on Wednesday. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4504, @SharghDaily/168834)

Defense Minister Israel Katz stated the IDF will not withdraw a millimeter from Lebanon until Hezbollah is disarmed, confirmed this is accepted by the US and anchored in the military annex to the framework agreement signed between Israel and Lebanon last week, and described the IDF presence as long-term. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
Katz confirmed that he and US Central Command chief Adm. Brad Cooper agreed the IDF will not withdraw from the three security zones in Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz confirmed near-100% destruction of villages along the line of contact in western and central sectors of southern Lebanon, 73% destruction in the eastern sector, with approximately 600,000 Shiites fled from southern Lebanon villages and 700,000 displaced from Hezbollah's Dahiyeh stronghold in Beirut. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz stated the IDF had planned a massive aerial campaign that would have dismantled Hezbollah but was stopped due to American pressure linking the Lebanon and Iran arenas, and confirmed the IDF still has more tunnels to destroy including a major underground system beneath Beaufort Ridge to be destroyed with 500 tons of explosives. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

The IDF confirmed sealing the massive tunnel where the body of deputy Hadar Goldin was held, which served as the seat of a Hamas battalion commander, was over 16 km long, and required more than 30,000 cubic meters of concrete for the mission. (Source: @amitsegal/62648)

IDF spokesperson released a viral video in Arabic titled 'on every card there is a senior Hamas name, but in the end always comes the red stamp — eliminated. Hamas is on the way to disappearing.' (Source: @inon_yttach/9210)

Katz confirmed the Israeli military holds nearly 70% of Gaza Strip territory and stated the settlement administration is ready to establish three settlements in the northern Gaza envelope immediately upon receiving political approval. (Source: @almogboker78/17628, @manniefabian/58707)
Israeli military vehicles fired intensively with intermittent explosions east of Al-Shujaiya and Al-Tuffah neighborhoods east of Gaza City. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373616)

The US reportedly transferred a document of demands regarding Gaza to Israel, with Americans expected to receive written approval; the document reflects American pressure to advance Trump's plan even without Hamas disarmament and parallel to Washington's desire not to resume war. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373609)

China's representative at the Security Council stated settlement in the West Bank must be stopped, there is no solution without establishing a Palestinian state, and the Gaza ceasefire has not yet entered into force while children are killed there daily. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373614)

Smotritch stated the settlement administration operating under the Defense Ministry is ready to establish three settlements in the northern Gaza envelope immediately upon receiving political approval, as part of completing the conquest of remaining Gaza territory, defeating Hamas, and establishing a Jewish settlement security belt. (Source: @almogboker78/17628)

An IDF event occurred in southern Lebanon with details pending announcement by the IDF spokesperson, while warplanes were reported flying toward Lebanon with maximum caution. (Source: @pkpoi/143026, @redlinkleb/29078)

Daily drone detection statistics from southern Lebanon showed 153 drones detected, with most detected villages being Beit Yacoub (11), Nabatieh al-Fawqa (11), Mifdoun (10), Kafr Tibnit (10), and Zoutar al-Gharbiyeh (8); most active districts were Nabatieh (49), Bent Jbeil (32), and Tyre (20). (Source: @redlinkleb/29102)
Two airstrikes were recorded on Deir Srian and four artillery strikes on Yahmar al-Shaqiq, Deir Srian, Beit Yacoub, Hadatha, and Kafr Tibnit in southern Lebanon. (Source: @redlinkleb/29102)

Katz stated the Lebanese army refused to enter the Ali Taher Ridge area where Hezbollah has a major tunnel system, so the IDF remains stationed there but has not entered underground passages where approximately 30 Hezbollah operatives are believed to be holed up. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
Katz stated it was clear that Shiite villages along the line of contact had to disappear to protect Israel's border from Hezbollah. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

The Israeli army broadcast scenes of dancing and dabke from central cities that the Jolani government claims are under its control, while sources describe Jolani's gangs pursuing Shia in Homs, demolishing their homes and displacing them to the suburbs and to Tehran. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80350)
Katz confirmed the IDF will not withdraw from the security zone in Syria as part of the tripartite agreement covering Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Iraq's Supreme Judicial Council reported investigations with the Deputy Minister of Oil for Distribution Affairs resulted in the seizure of 11 million dollars and 4 billion dinars. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80338)

Qatar's Ministry of Transportation advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing and other maritime activities until further notice, likely related to regional security tensions. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518)

Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi arrived in Oman to discuss joint control of the Strait of Hormuz, indicating active Gulf diplomatic engagement on strategic maritime chokepoints. (Source: @asafroz/50835)
French President Macron hosted Sultan Haitham bin Tariq of Oman at the Elysee Palace in Paris, indicating high-level diplomatic engagement between European and Gulf states. (Source: @asafroz/50845)

key_developments: IRGC Navy political deputy Mohammad Akbarzadeh killed under conflicting reports of either a Mossad security checkpoint attack in Baveh, Kermanshah or a vehicle overturn accident in Kerman Province; he was reportedly opposed to negotiations with America. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373618, @shin_persian/7300, @rodast_omiddana/74530)

Iran's Foreign Ministry Spokesman Baghaei explicitly denied any upcoming negotiations with the US at any level, contradicting Trump's announcement that Iran requested a Doha meeting and White House claims of high-level talks this week. (Source: @SharghDaily/168834, @Faytuks_Network/4504)

Defense Minister Katz confirmed the IDF will maintain long-term presence in Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza security zones, with near-100% destruction of border villages in western and central southern Lebanon and 73% in the eastern sector. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

The US transferred a demands document to Israel regarding Gaza, pressing forward with Trump's plan even without Hamas disarmament, while China's UN representative called for halting West Bank settlement and establishing a Palestinian state. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373609, @rasedal3ado138e/373614)

IDF confirmed sealing a 16+ km tunnel used as a Hamas battalion commander's headquarters where deputy Hadar Goldin's body was held, requiring over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete. (Source: @amitsegal/62648)

Qatar issued a maritime advisory suspending all vessel sailing activities, and a delegation from Israel's Foreign Ministry and Home Front Command departed for Venezuela following an earthquake. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518, @amitsegal/62657)

Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi arrived in Oman to discuss joint control of the Strait of Hormuz, signaling Iranian efforts to secure strategic maritime interests amid escalating regional tensions. (Source: @asafroz/50835)
sections.threat_assessment: The conflicting narratives surrounding IRGC Navy deputy Akbarzadeh's death — a claimed Mossad checkpoint attack in Kermanshah versus a reported road accident in Kerman — reflect the intensifying shadow war between Iran and Israel, with potential for rapid escalation. Defense Minister Katz's explicit commitment to long-term IDF presence across three security zones (Lebanon, Syria, Gaza) and confirmation of near-total destruction of southern Lebanese border villages signals a sustained Israeli offensive posture. The contradictory signals on US-Iran diplomacy, with Trump announcing a Doha meeting while Iran's Foreign Ministry categorically denies negotiations, create dangerous ambiguity that could trigger miscalculation on both sides.
sections.regional_response: Qatar's emergency maritime suspension advisory reflects Gulf states' vulnerability to escalating Iran-Israel tensions, while Doha simultaneously positions itself as a mediation venue hosting back-channel US-Iran discussions through Pakistani and Qatari intermediaries. China's UN Security Council intervention demanding a Palestinian state and halting West Bank settlement signals great-power competition over the conflict's diplomatic framing. Iran's outreach to Oman on joint Strait of Hormuz control demonstrates Tehran's effort to leverage regional partnerships for strategic depth amid American pressure.
sections.intelligence_notes: The discrepancy between Iranian sources describing Akbarzadeh's death as a Mossad attack in Kermanshah versus the regime-affiliated Entekhab News account of a Kerman road accident suggests either active information operations or genuine internal confusion about the circumstances. Katz's revelation that Trump personally applied pressure creating the Lebanon-Iran arena linkage that prevented Hezbollah's collapse indicates direct presidential-level intervention in Israeli military planning. The IDF's continued presence at Ali Taher Ridge without entering underground passages containing approximately 30 Hezbollah operatives suggests either operational caution or ongoing intelligence gathering on the tunnel system.
